description: Style NoteThese high-top rustic shoes from woodland blend vintage cowboy styling with a contemporary minimal trend. These classic three-hole lace ups with a leather inner give off a subtly stylish vibe. Style this pair with kakhi cargo shorts or trousers and a casual check shirt. Product DetailsHigh-top leather upper with strategically placed overlay on the heelBranding embossed on the lateral side of the midfootThree-hole central lace upsPadded tongueSoft insole for in-step comfortOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heelStitch detailing on the seams of the toe boxTPU outsole with circular and oval lugs all over and a curved midfoot Material and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
